name: @nest-langchain/demo-providers
description: NestJS demo app for @nest-langchain provider packages.

scripts.prebuild: pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/openai build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/openai-compatible build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/anthropic build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/gemini build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/bedrock build
scripts.start:dev: pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/openai build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/openai-compatible build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/anthropic build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/gemini build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/bedrock build && tsx watch src/main.ts
scripts.pretest:e2e: pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/openai build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/openai-compatible build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/anthropic build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/gemini build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/bedrock build
scripts.pretypecheck: pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/openai build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/openai-compatible build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/anthropic build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/gemini build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/bedrock build
